zh.Arnstadt, Schwarzburg-Sonderhausen, Thur: 德國史瓦茲包-森德沙奧森阿恩斯塔特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Walther von Arnstein於大約1140年出生在德國史瓦茲包-森德沙奧森阿恩斯塔特時，他的父親Graf Walter II von Arnstedt42歲，母親Ermengard von Plötzkau27歲。他於1194年之前與Gertrud von Ballenstedt結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1238年享年99歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Arnstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from either of two places in northern Bavaria named Arnstein (‘eagle's crag’).

nameMeanings.name: Walther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

variants.name: Walter
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Walther von Arnstein was born about 1140, in Arnstadt, Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Germany, his father, Graf Walter II von Arnstedt, was 42 and his mother, Ermengard von Plötzkau, was 27. He married Gertrud von Ballenstedt before 1194. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1238, at the age of 99.

fr.Arnstein, Mansteld-Sudharz, Saxony-Anhal: Arnstein, Harkerode, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Walther von Arnstein est né environ 1140, à Arnstadt, Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Walter II von Arnstedt, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Ermengard von Plötzkau, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Gertrud von Ballenstedt avant 1194. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1238, à l’âge de 99 ans.

de.Arnstein, Mansteld-Sudharz, Saxony-Anhal: Arnstein, Harkerode, Mansfelder Land, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Walther von Arnstein um 1140 in Arnstadt, Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Walter II von Arnstedt 42 und seine Mutter Ermengard von Plötzkau 27. Er hat vor 1194 Gertrud von Ballenstedt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1238 im Alter von 99 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Walther von Arnstein è nato il circa 1140 nel Arnstadt, Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Walter II von Arnstedt, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Ermengard von Plötzkau, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Gertrud von Ballenstedt prima del 1194. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1238, all'età di 99 anni.

ko.Arnstein, Mansteld-Sudharz, Saxony-Anhal: 독일 작센-아할트 맨스펠더 랜드 하르케로드 아른스타인
ko.lifeSummary: Graf Walther von Arnstein(이)가 대략 1140년 독일 슈워즈버그-손더쇼센 아른스타드트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Walter II von Arnstedt(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengard von Plötzkau(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1194년 이전 Gertrud von Ballenstedt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1238년 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Walther von Arnstein nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Arnstadt, Schwarzburg-Sondershausen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Walter II von Arnstedt, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Ermengard von Plötzkau, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrud von Ballenstedt antes 1194. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1238, com 99 anos.

ru.Arnstein, Mansteld-Sudharz, Saxony-Anhal: арнстин, харкирод, мансфелдир ланд, сачсен-анэлт, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Walther von Arnstein родился около 1140 г. в местности арнстадт, щварзбург-сондиршаусен, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Walter II von Arnstedt было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Ermengard von Plötzkau, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrud von Ballenstedt перед 1194 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1238 г. в возрасте 99 лет.

Se casó con Gertrud von Ballenstedt antes de 1194. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1238, a la edad de 99 años.
